text: I feel a sense of curiosity and introspection in this space. The purple glow creates an atmosphere that blurs the boundaries between routine and innovation. The second scene's wall, marked "R+D" and references to "research," invites me to consider my own process of understanding and questioning. The projected text speaks to consciousness and observation, making me aware of my own presence as both observer and observed. I sense the weight of the unknown, but also the excitement of exploration and discovery.
